prompt: I have a vanilla JS app built with Vite. I want to add Peril review annotations. I don't use React.

assertions.check: Summary or package.json references @peril-ai/core but not @peril-ai/react

assertions.text: Uses createReviewOverlay from @peril-ai/core to set up the overlay
assertions.check: main.ts or a new file imports createReviewOverlay from @peril-ai/core

assertions.text: An MCP configuration file is created
No files import from @peril-ai/react or use ReviewProvider
assertions.check: No source file contains import from @peril-ai/react
